case_title: THOMAS M PIERCE VS. RAYMOND ALFRED GRINSELL ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) TOM CARPIO, PROPERTY MANAGER FILED BY DEFENDANT GRINSELL LAKE, LLC FOUNDER'S REAL ESTATE SERVICES
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PUSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY PIERCE, THOMAS M AS TO DEFENDANT GRINSELL, RAYMOND ALFRED GRINSELL LAKE, LLC FOUNDER'S REAL ESTATE SERVICES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-22-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROGRESS REPORT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE:$30.00 SERVED MAY-17-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FOUNDER'S REAL ESTATE SERVICES
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $60) SERVED APR-21-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GRINSELL LAKE, LLC
REMARK: EXHIBITS RECD IN MAIL-FORWARDED TO COURTROOM

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-22-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-02-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF THOMAS M. PIERCE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS GRINSELL LAKE, LLC AND FOUNDERS REAL ESTATE SERVICES REPRESENTED BY TOM CARPIO PORPERTY MANGER ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT RAYMOND ALFRED GRINSELL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RAYMOND ALFRED GRINSELL IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE BY COURT. PROOF OF SERVICE WAS NOT FILED AS TO DEFENDANT RAYMOND ALFRED GRINSELL. PARTIES AGREE TO A SETTLEMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $500.00 TO BE PAID TO PLAINTIFF BY JULY 23, 2021, WITH A CHECK TO BE DELIVERED UNDER THE DOOR OF PLAINTIFF'S RESIDENCE. PARTIES ARE TO INCREASE COMMUNICATION EFFORTS WITH EACH OTHER VIA USPS. PLAINTIFF AGREES TO ACCEPT VOICE MAIL COMMUNICATIONS FROM DEFENDANTS PROVIDED IT IS SUBSEQUENTLY DOCUMENTED BY LETTERS THOROUGH USPS. PROGRESS REPORT DATE IS SET FOR AUGUST 2, 2021. IF NO APPEARANCES, THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
